title: Proof to be maintained for three years
doc_html:
§909.  Proof to be maintained for three years

In all cases, under this Chapter, in which a person is required to give proof of financial responsibility, he shall maintain such proof for a period of three years.

Added by Acts 1962, No. 495 §2.
